machen.title: The Great God Pan
machen.desc: Willows-similar lists; the uncanny materializing into something concrete.

aickman.title: Cold Hand in Mine
aickman.desc: Aickman is Goodreads' top similar author for Ligotti; strange stories, unresolved.

jackson.title: We Have Always Lived in the Castle
jackson.desc: Jackson orbit around your Elementals/Summer People reads.

labatut.title: When We Cease to Understand the World

evenson.title: A Collapse of Horses
evenson.desc: Appears directly on reader lists of books like Songs of a Dead Dreamer.

enriquez.title: Things We Lost in the Fire

perutz.title: By Night Under the Stone Bridge

hodgson.title: The House on the Borderland
hodgson.desc: On readers' Willows-similar lists; cosmic dread, strange structure.

mrjames.title: Oh, Whistle, and I'll Come to You
mrjames.desc: Grouped with Blackwood/Machen as the masters of suggestion-then-presence.

barron.title: The Imago Sequence
barron.desc: Barron's collections are the most-cited follow-on for Ligotti readers.

klein.title: The Ceremonies
klein.desc: Cited alongside Harvest Home for the same slow ritual dread; Machen-derived.

straub.title: Ghost Story
straub.desc: Standard co-recommendation for The Elementals; atmospheric presence gaining weight.

tryon.title: Harvest Home
tryon.desc: Rural village folk horror; repeatedly co-recommended with Dark Harvest and The Elementals.

farris.title: All Heads Turn When the Hunt Goes By

draymond.title: He Died With His Eyes Open

perec.title: W, or the Memory of Childhood

lockwood.title: No One Is Talking About This

morenogarcia.title: Mexican Gothic
morenogarcia.desc: Orbits the same recommendations as The Elementals and Harvest Home.

oconnor.title: A Good Man Is Hard to Find

wolfe.title: The Book of the New Sun

schwob.title: The King in the Golden Mask

ellison.title: I Have No Mouth and I Must Scream

oates.title: Where Are You Going, Where Have You Been?

ward.title: The Last House on Needless Street
